content: Cleanup: delete /app/backend and /app/frontend (stale FARM template). Add a top-level README to mirror the cleanup in the GitHub repo.
Backend tests: Jest + supertest with pg-mem (in-memory Postgres) covering /api/auth (signup/login/me/tokens), /api/bookmarks CRUD, /api/import analyze+commit, /api/folders, /api/sessions
E2E test scaffold: Playwright config + 1 critical-path test (setup -> login -> add bookmark -> import HTML -> create PAT)
CI: .github/workflows/ci.yml with Postgres+Redis service containers, lint + backend jest + frontend build
Optional CD: .github/workflows/deploy.yml that SSHs to Hetzner and rebuilds on main merges
Re-validate, re-tar, write UNIFICATION.md explaining what was/wasn't done & why
